chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C. P. No. D-3085 of 2025 ______________________________________________________________________________________ Date Order with Signature(s) of Judge(s) For hearing of main case. 17.07.2025. Mr. Muhammad Hashim, Advocate for the Petitioner. Mr. K. V. Vaswami, AAG Mr. Bakht Ali Dahio, Additional Deputy Commissioner-II, Karachi East. ________________ The Additional Deputy Commissioner-II, Karachi East, present in Court and submits that petitioner is not providing the proper documents including the original CNIC. After such statement, learned counsel for the petitioner submits that the petitioner will provide all the required documents within a week. Under the circumstances, we dispose of instant petition by directing the petitioner to provide all necessary documents required to the Additional Deputy Commissioner-II, Karachi East, who will decide the entire fate within fifteen days in accordance with law. Instant petition stands disposed of in the above terms. JUDGE JUDGE Nadeem
